target: 15. Out-of-Control Gears

We both need to go home for a bit anyway,
how about you join us, Kaori?
Yeah… I'll take you up on that.

…Huh?
Shinpei…?
Hah… hah…
(I'm back…!)

What's wrong?
Your face looks…
Ughh.
Gehhh…!
Shh… Shinpei!?
Shinpei, are you okay!?
Hah… hah…

Did you fall into the sea and drink seawater!?
Did you hit some weird spot!?
If you're still feeling sick, should I massage your back?
(Mio… Kaori…)
(Both of you are alive!)
S, Shinpei…?
It's okay…!

Ah, I'm fine…
Maybe I just got seasick on the ferry.

Is that so?
It's been a while since you got off the ferry.

Shinpei, want some water?
This bottle hasn't been opened yet.
Take it, Shinpei.
Ah, yeah…

(Hah… hah… calm down.
First, I need to sort this out…)

(First time was on the ferry.
Second time was right after landing.
And this time… after meeting Mio…)

(The 'starting point' when time loops
is gradually getting later…)

(The events before the starting point
seem to become 'facts'…)

(In other words, there's no way
for me to avoid falling into the sea…)

(The next time the loop happens,
the starting point will probably be even later…)

Huh… walking around the island
really makes me feel like I'm back.

Kaori, how long has it been
since you last came back?

I moved away when I was in fifth grade…
About seven years.
(If I do nothing, during Kaori's live stream…
…that tragedy will repeat.)

That's amazing.
I just wanted to increase my mother's food,
but I didn't expect to see such an interesting scene.

(Who is the mother…? The Shadow's master?
What's the point of sacrificing so many people like that?)
(But what can I do to stop that tragedy?)

(If I ask them to cancel the festival
and tell everyone to leave the island?)

(But I don't think that's realistic,
and if they find out, they might speed up their plans…)

On your days off,
do you go to Shibuya?

Sometimes, but not too often.
More like to Kanda.

(Ultimately, the goal is
fundamental solutions…
That is, defeating the Shadow's master.)

(But without knowing the master's identity,
I can't do anything…)
Kaori, you have a meeting with the chamber of commerce later, right!?

Eh, yeah…
Why do you know that, Shinpei?

(The reason so many people came to the festival
was because Kaori talked about her live stream
on her channel.)

(If I can stop the stream before
the meeting decides how to announce it…)

Do you mean… you noticed
my job?
Huh? What do you mean?

Hmm… it's no use hiding it.
It'll probably come out anyway.
Well…

Whaaat!?
Kaori, you're that idol's
Kaori-chan!?

Y-yeah.
Actually, that's right.

Wow, I'm moved!
It's really Kaori-chan!

I came back to the island
because I'm doing a secret live stream and talk show
on the festival day.

Kaori, about that event,
if possible, right now…

No, sorry!
Wait a second!

(Suddenly telling her to stop
would just confuse her…)
(…and might hurt her.)

Um… about the meeting after this…
Can't you skip it?
…Why?

I noticed the live stream because
I read online about a big idol
saying they're doing a live stream on this island.

Also, there were posts about
a stalker targeting Kaori
who had already arrived on the island.

It's dangerous for an idol like you
to come here.
Then… what should I do?

Ah… maybe you should skip the meeting
and go back to the mainland by ferry for now.

I can't do that.
It's an important meeting.

But…
Kaori's safety…

I know you're worried about me,
but it's impossible.

Also… I wanted to come early
to feel the island's atmosphere.

I asked to come early to discuss
after feeling the island's air,
so I can't cancel now.

Then, after the meeting,
go back to the mainland first,
and come back on the festival day!
That's impossible…

Shinpei…
Don't push her too hard,
or you'll just make Kaori worried.
But…!

No matter how many times you say it,
it's impossible.
That's part of being a pro.

This time… I finally came back
to do something for the island I love.

Even if it's dangerous or hard,
I want to see it through.
I know that, but…
No, you don't understand at all.
Huh…!?

My feelings…
Don't say you can understand them easily!
K, Kaori…

(That's right…
I've just reunited with Kaori)

(So how could I say I understand
her feelings…)
I wanted you to support me, you know.

Mio.
I'm going back to the inn.

Huh!?
But…!
I'm sorry for making you worry…

Wait, Kaori!
Stop the live stream from your room!

I'm really sorry!
But it's really dangerous!

While you're on the island,
don't leave your room!
Kaori… she's gone…
(Did my voice reach her…?)

What did you do?
Shinpei, you're acting weird.

N, nothing…
I was just really worried.
(For now, I'll apologize to her later…)

(I'll try to ask her again
to stop the stream then.)

(If it stops that tragedy…
I'll do anything!)

(The funeral hall…
That person should be there.)
Karikiri-san!

Ah, Shinpei.
Thanks for everything today.
Thank you so much.

By the way, Karikiri-san,
are you joining the meeting
with the chamber of commerce and Kaori?
After this… no, wait.
Shinpei, why do you know that?

Huh?
Ah, yeah…

Ah, right.
I met Kaori at the port.
She's my classmate from elementary school…

Ah, I see.
So that's why you were asking.
Then there's no need to hide.
Karikiri-san, I have a request.
What is it?

I think the meeting will discuss
how to announce the event…

I'd like Kaori's live stream
to not happen.
Eh…?

If this continues, something
terrible will happen on this island.
So… please!
/translate

Well, even if you say that…
There are also the offices of the Chamber of Commerce and Kaori's office.
S-So, please do something about that!

No, no, wait a minute.
I'm troubled if you say that so much.

What kind of outrageous thing are you talking about?
What's even happening?
That… I can't go into details, but there are people trying to commit crimes using Kaori's stream!
Where did that information come from?
That… it was from online posts…
Can I see that post?
Ah…

Sorry, I just randomly searched and found a post, so…
I can't show it right now.

…I see.
But then it's hard to bring up as an agenda item in the meeting, isn't it?
S-So…!
Hey, Shinpei, how do you even know about the stream?
That's something we were supposed to discuss in the meeting later, yet you knew about it.
S-That's…

…Well, please calm down.
You're probably confused because of Ushio's situation, aren't you?
Just rest quietly today, and leave the rest to us.
H-Hello…!
Everyone, good evening~~~!

Kaori Koyumiba's 'Koyuba Channel'!
Tonight, let's stay up a bit and chat together!
Damn, the stream has started…
( I tried contacting the Chamber of Commerce after that, but it didn't work out in the end )
( I tried calling and emailing Kaori several times, but… )
I'm currently at a certain place~~~. Where could it be?
( I didn't get a response at all. I guess I've run out of patience… )
Huh? You want me to answer quickly? Ugh, there's an impatient person here.
Then I'll just say the answer. The answer is…
It's Hitogashima Island in Wakayama Prefecture!
…Huh?
I'll announce it~~! Surprisingly, I, Kaori Koyumiba…
On July 24th, I'll be holding a solo live performance and talk show here in Hitogashima Island!
H-How did you reveal the location!?
W-What's going on!?
From previous experiences, the venue was never revealed until the end…!
Actually, this live stream was supposed to be a secret live… but…
Due to my strong request, it's now being announced in advance!
( Why did it change…? Did I anger Kaori? )
So, I'm sorry for announcing the venue at the last minute~.
The live is scheduled for the day after tomorrow, so maybe only those who can come in person will be able to join…
Huh? "I'm going there!"? That's great~!
Hitogashima Island is my hometown… I really love this place!
So… if you all could come visit, I'd be happy!
( So many comments… If this continues, more people than last time might flood the island… )
( No good… I have to do something! )
" Don't go to Hitogashima Island, it'll cause a panic! "
( Everyone, please! Think again after seeing this comment! )
…Well, then! Let's meet in the next live performance and talk show stream!
That's 'Koyuba Channel'! Goodnight!
( Damn, everyone's moving on to other comments, no one noticed my comment… )
( Honestly, who would believe such a thing… )
No, I can't give up! I'll find a way to tell everyone!
